detail: Enum: None, Broadcast, SubscriptionsImport, PositiveListsImport, StandardReceiversImport. Only these four (+ None) are valid activity types. Not extensible without code change.
The description stored is a locale resource KEY — not a pre-translated string. The admin UI calls ILocalizationService.GetLocalizedResource(key, languageId) at display time.
One ActivityLog parent row per (type, objectId). Multiple ActivityLogEntry children per event. Parent is created on first entry.
rule: ActivityLog is per-object — ActivityLogEntries are per-event

detail: All activity tracked belongs to customer-owned objects. objectId references the entity primary key (e.g. FtpSettingId, DataImportFileId).
